scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter @stealth-trails-bank/api test:unit && pnpm --filter @stealth-trails-bank/worker test && pnpm --filter @stealth-trails-bank/web test && pnpm --filter @stealth-trails-bank/admin test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @stealth-trails-bank/api test:coverage && pnpm --filter @stealth-trails-bank/worker test:coverage && pnpm --filter @stealth-trails-bank/web test:coverage && pnpm --filter @stealth-trails-bank/admin test:coverage
scripts.test:ci: pnpm build && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm test:e2e
